studyName: SCORCH: Single Nuclei Transcriptome Profiling in Addiction Circuitry of the HIV+ Brain

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table reports each subject's race, age at death, elapsed time between death and discovery, year of autopsy, ethnicity, viral status, years with HIV, cognitive status, brain pathology, spinal cord pathology, antiretroviral therapy, most recent plasma viral load prior to death, number of months prior to death of last plasma viral load measurement, toxicology status within 2 years of death for: amphetamines, barbiturates, benzodiazepines, buprenorphine, THC, cocaine, methadone, methamphetamine, opiods, oxycodone, phenylcyclidine, and triyclic antidepressants, positive toxicology results for cerebellum, status for diagnosed substance use disorders within 2 years of death, lifetime diagnoses of substance use disorders, and  whether death was due to drug overdose.

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Age at death, in years

variables.name: ANTIRETROVIRAL_THERAPY
variables.description: Controlled vocabulary of antiretroviral treatments (three letter treatment codes). If subject has a history of multiple antiretroviral therapies, this field indicates the most recent

variables.name: AUTOPSY_YEAR
variables.description: Year autopsy was conducted

variables.name: BRAIN_PATHOLOGY
variables.description: Free text for brain pathology description coming from tissue sources.

variables.name: COGNITIVE_STATUS
variables.description: Free text for most recent cognitive status determined by tissue source

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_WITHIN_TWO_YEARS_OF_DEATH
variables.description: Semicolon separated list of any diagnosed substance use disorders within two years of death. Criteria used and code (e.g. PRISM: , DSM_IV:303.90)

variables.name: ETHNICITY
variables.description: Ethnicity of the subject

variables.name: LIFETIME_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Semicolon separated list of any diagnosed substance use disorders. Criteria used and code (e.g. PRISM: stimulant abuse_dependance, DSM_IV:303.90)

variables.name: MONTHS_SINCE_LAST_PLASMA_VIRAL_MEASUREMENT
variables.description: Number of months prior to death of last plasma viral measurement

variables.name: OVERDOSE_DEATH
variables.description: Was death due to a drug overdose

variables.name: PLASMA_VIRAL_LOAD_MEASUREMENT
variables.description: Most recent HIV viral load measurement prior to death or at necropsy, copies per ml

variables.name: POSTMORTEM_INTERVAL
variables.description: Time elapsed between death and discovery, in hours

variables.name: POSTMORTEM_TOXICOLOGY
variables.description: Semicolon seperated list of positive postmortem toxicology tests conducted on cerebellum brain tissue

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race of subject

variables.name: SPINAL_CORD_PATHOLOGY
variables.description: Free text for spinal cord pathology description coming from tissue source

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_AMP
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Amphetamine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_BAR
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Barbiturate

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_BUP
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Buprenorphine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_BZO
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Benzodiazepine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_COC
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Cocaine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_COMMENTS
variables.description: Free text field for comments about toxicology

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_MET
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Methamphetamine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_MTD
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Methadone

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_OPI
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Opioids

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_OXY
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Oxycodone

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_PCP
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Phencyclidine

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_TCA
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Tricyclic Antidepressant

variables.name: TOX_HISTORY_THC
variables.description: Toxicology status within 2 years of death for Tetrahydrocannabinol

variables.name: VIRAL_STATUS
variables.description: Controlled vocabulary for viral status of the subject

variables.name: YEARS_WITH_HIV
variables.description: Years living with HIV

tables.description: This subject consent data table reports each subject's subject ID, consent, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Registered consent groups (Data Use Limitations (DUL)) as determined by submitters' Institutional Review Boards (IRB) or equivalent body.

variables.name: POOLING
variables.description: IDs of subjects included in the pool represented by the given SUBJECT_ID for this row of the dataset.

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID2
variables.description: Subject ID mapping against dbGaP collection NIDA_HIVNeurogenomics_OpiateCocaine

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE2
variables.description: Subject mapping against dbGaP collection NIDA_HIVNeurogenomics_OpiateCocaine

tables.description: This sample attributes data table reports each sample's body site of origin, analyte type, tumor status, assessment technique, and anatomical site assayed.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: ANATOMICAL_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site assayed using UBERON Ontology

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: TECHNIQUE
variables.description: Technique used in assessing sample

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
